info.title: Fluxer API
info.description: API for Fluxer, a free and open source instant messaging and VoIP chat app built for friends, groups, and communities.

delete.description: Permanently removes a channel and all its content. Only server administrators or the channel owner can delete channels. When `delete_messages` is set on a group DM, the caller's authored messages in the group are deleted before leaving and sudo mode verification is required.

schema.description: Whether to suppress the system message when leaving a group DM
When leaving a group DM, also delete all messages the caller has sent in the channel

post.description: Returns presigned upload URLs for message attachments in the target channel. Small files (<=10MB) return a singlepart PUT URL; larger files return a multipart plan (upload_id + per-part URLs) that the client should complete via the matching /attachments/complete endpoint. Requires message send and attachment permissions in guild channels.

api_code_version.description: Version of the API server code

api.description: Base URL for authenticated API requests

api_client.description: Base URL for client API requests

api_public.description: Base URL for public API requests

media.description: Base URL for the media proxy

static_cdn.description: Base URL for static assets (avatars, emojis, etc.)

marketing.description: Base URL for the marketing website

admin.description: Base URL for the admin panel

webapp.description: Base URL for the web application

hcaptcha_site_key.description: hCaptcha site key if using hCaptcha

turnstile_site_key.description: Cloudflare Turnstile site key if using Turnstile

self_hosted.description: Whether this is a self-hosted instance

presigned_attachment_uploads.description: Whether clients can request presigned attachment upload URLs

emails_enabled.description: Whether the instance sends emails (verification, password reset, etc.)

provider.description: Stable machine name of the active GIF provider.

display_name.description: Human-readable provider name shown in the UI

attribution_required.description: Whether the client must show a "Powered by …" watermark for this provider

enabled.description: Whether SSO is enabled for this instance

enforced.description: Whether SSO is required for all users

display_name.description: Display name of the SSO provider

mode.description: Public registration mode for this instance

admin_registration_urls_enabled.description: Whether admin-issued registration URLs are accepted

single_community.description: Whether this instance runs as a single community that every user automatically joins

single_community_guild_id.description: The stock community guild ID when single-community mode is enabled

direct_messages_disabled.description: Whether direct messages and friend requests are disabled instance-wide

community.description: Community topology and direct-message policy for this instance

gif_enabled.description: Whether the GIF picker is enabled for this instance

youtube_enabled.description: Whether YouTube link enrichment is enabled for this instance

bluesky_enabled.description: Whether Bluesky profile connections are enabled for this instance

services.description: Optional third-party service integrations enabled for this instance

sessionToken.name: Authorization
sessionToken.description: User session token from login: `Authorization: <token>` (no prefix). Prefer a bot account over user tokens where possible.
